title: French Beef Bourguignon
description: A classic French stew made with tender beef and smoky flavors.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: Chuck or short ribs work well

instructions: Season the beef with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, cook the bacon over medium heat until browned.
Remove the bacon and set aside.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Remove the beef and set aside.
Add the onion, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the red wine, beef broth, tomato paste, thyme, and bay leaves to the pot.
Return the beef to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the browned bacon.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh thyme.
